title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Panel Advocate
shortInfo: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Panel Advocate. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through RSLSA official website.

basic_details.job_title: RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Panel Advocate. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through RSLSA official website.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate enrolled with Bar Council with more than 1 year regular practice experience as per Advocates Act 1961
qualification.details: Advocate enrolled with Bar Council with more than 1 year regular practice experience as per Advocates Act 1961.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pali.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the RSLSA Panel Advocate posts is 15 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the Panel Advocate post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must be an Advocate enrolled with the Bar Council and possess more than 1 year of regular practice experience as per the Advocates Act 1961.

faq.question: How can I apply for the RSLSA Panel Advocate positions?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Panel Advocate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications, followed by selection based on the seniority of practice and experience, and finally, the preparation of a merit list.

faq.question: What is the job type for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: The Panel Advocate positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA).

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is S 2(137)/2025/Rajsa/DO/DS-1/323.

faq.question: Can I apply online for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline. You need to send a physical application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of RSLSA, which is http://rjss.nic.in.

seo_tags: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority Panel Advocate (Criminal)
